x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Runbook automation enables Now Assist TSOM AI Agents to execute automated remediation. Without runbooks, AI Agent TSOM actions are limited to alerts and routing.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure runbooks for key alert types via sa_runbook_list.do. Automate top repetitive remediation tasks. Now Assist TSOM AI Agents leverage runbooks for automated remediation.
